lane_selected_reason: Foundation work required before larger-model validation or llama.cpp integration; current artifact schema is implicit and script-dependent; private paths in phase scripts; regression suite is minimal

larger_model_validation.reason: Cannot generalize to 1.5B/3B without hardened artifact schema; new model runs would add private-path scripts on top of same technical debt

runtime_integration_design.reason: Premature without stable artifact format; design would be based on moving target

robustness_extension.reason: Diminishing returns; 384-pair aggregate already strong; can be mini-task in 31BF

technical_writeup.reason: Does not advance implementation; can be sub-artifact of 31BF

runner_constraints: Must run on CPU with llama.cpp library available
Requires GGUF model file at known path
No GPU required for current tensor harness
repo_constraints: Artifact schema must be formally documented and not implicit in scripts
No hardcoded private paths in committed code
All phase scripts must pass regression before committing
Regression must run from clean clone with only public inputs
hardware_storage_cautions: Model files (Qwen2.5-0.5B GGUF) are large; stored on external USB mount at /media/matthew-villnave/VL_usb/
Model path in scripts: /media/matthew-villnave/VL_usb/models/... — must be made relative or env-based in hardening
llama.cpp build at /home/matthew-villnave/llama.cpp/build/ — must be env-based
Results JSON files accumulate; current largest is ~30KB (31BB K_PARAMETER_SENSITIVITY.json)
forbidden_claims: no full-model runtime memory savings claim
no claim beyond standalone tensor harness

proposed_next_phase.name: Phase 31BF — Static Artifact Spec + Regression Hardening
proposed_next_phase.goal: Formalize artifact schema, harden manifest loader, strengthen regression suite, remove private paths from phase scripts
success_criteria: Artifact schema documented in SPEC.md or SCHEMA.md
Manifest loader passes schema validation tests
Regression suite has explicit cosine/MAE threshold constants
No hardcoded private paths in committed phase scripts
All existing phase scripts pass regression unchanged
SOURCE_OF_TRUTH updated with schema version fact
tasks: Define stable artifact schema for .sdiw (packed W_low) and .sdir (sparse residual) files
Formalize manifest schema: fields, types, required vs optional, schema_version
Audit bundle_manifest.py for schema compliance; add validation on load
Add schema validation step to regression suite
Add explicit cosine/MAE thresholds as constants in regression suite
Scan phase scripts for hardcoded /home/matthew-villnave paths; replace with env-based or manifest-relative
Document canonical run order for phase scripts
Verify all scripts pass regression unchanged after hardening
Update SOURCE_OF_TRUTH with schema version fact
not_this_phase: No implementation of larger model validation
